ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
s=baseUrl.match(/(.*\/\d+)(.*)/)
num=result.match(/_(\d+)[^>]*>尾页</)[1]
var txt=[]
txt.push({text:"第1节",href:baseUrl})
for(var i=2;i-num<=0;i++){
	txt.push({text:"第"+i+"节",href:s[1]+"_"+i+s[2]})}
	txt
</js>

ruleToc.nextTocUrl:
<js>
var list=[];
var a=result.match(/\"page\-link\"\>\d+\/(\d+)\<\/a\>/)[1];
for(var b=1;b<=a;b++){
var c=book.bookUrl+'index_'+b+'.html';
  list.push(c);
}
list
</js>
